rootCause: Node emitted ExperimentalWarning diagnostics for known third-party CommonJS-to-ESM interop inside npm's debug/supports-color dependency path and ESLint's eslintrc/svelte-eslint-parser compatibility path while validation scripts ran npm, npx, ESLint, and Playwright web server invocations.
resolution: Added a targeted Node preload filter for only those third-party ExperimentalWarning messages and applied it to the prompt-surface validation entry points that emitted the noise, using absolute preload paths so inherited NODE_OPTIONS does not depend on child process working directories. Real lint, type, build, test, console, and Playwright failures still surface normally.
